```diff
+ "#D: %s::%s:%d: Current SAR Report GTB: %u, the first SAR report GTB: %u, Tx On time GTB (Ms): %llu, Current Host GTB: %llu"
+ "%s::%s:%d: Failed to read SAR consumed value manually at address %u: ret: 0x%x"
+ "%s::%s:%d: HSAR Error: Detected that AR Buffer never updated while SAR consumed value has been updated!"
+ ""
+ "getCurrentSARConsumedGTB"
+ "sendCAEventHSARErrorGated"
+ "sendUserClientHSARErrorMessageGated"
- "%s::%s:%d: Checking SAR Report: Monitor Started: %llu (sec), Now: %llu (sec), Monitor Diff: %llu (sec), 1st SAR Report: %llu (sec), last SAR Report: %llu (sec), SAR Report Diff: %llu (sec)"
- "%s::%s:%d: Issue found on the SAR report"
- "%s::%s:%d: No issue on the SAR report"
- "%s::%s:%d: The first SAR reported timestamp is zero when Tx is off. So, reset the value to the SAR report timestamp"
- "%s::%s:%d: Trying to trigger logdump due to SAR report error"
- ""
- "sendCAEventHSARError"

```
